name: Broken HTML
description: Corrupt app.html in one app with invalid HTML to test pipeline resilience.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; QA or stabilizer may flag the app.

name: Missing spec.json
description: Remove spec.json from one app directory.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; pipeline may use fallback spec or stabilizer records corrupted app.

name: Corrupted metrics
expected_behavior: System stabilizer repairs or recreates file; pipeline continues.

name: Invalid pricing config
description: Write malformed JSON to an app's payment_config.json.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; monetization or readers skip or use defaults.

name: Missing deploy files
description: Delete app.html from one app's deploy folder.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; deploy index may list fewer apps or next build repopulates.

name: Duplicate app IDs
description: Add duplicate entries to growth/growth_experiments.json to test deduplication.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; growth engine or consumers handle duplicates.

name: Empty ideas.json
expected_behavior: Daemon skips build cycle and continues with evolution, portfolio, growth for existing apps.

name: Extremely large ideas list
description: Fill ideas/ideas.json with a very large number of placeholder ideas.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; idea injector or pipeline caps or processes batch.

name: Random file deletion simulation
description: Delete a non-critical file (e.g. idea.txt) from one app.
expected_behavior: Factory recovers and continues pipeline; agents fail safely or use fallbacks.

name: Malformed evolution_plan.json
expected_behavior: Code modifier and evolution engine skip or fail safely; pipeline continues.
